announce.message: The main demon of Tibian hell will now be born in Roshamul. Summon your guild to protect Pharaot.
Get ready for blood, death and destruction, Gaz Haragoth will come fucking every ass in Roshamul. Get ready asshole.
Gaz Haragoth was born my friend. If you're a man, go there. His hometown is Roshamuul.
